questions.explanation: The kanji 羊 means 'sheep' and is read as ひつじ.

questions.questionText: ゴールデンウイークも＿＿＿＿終わり、また忙しい毎日が始まった。
questions.explanation: 'あっけなく' means 'all too soon' or 'disappointingly short', which fits the context of Golden Week ending.

questions.questionText: ゴキブリめ、一匹＿＿＿＿逃がさないぞ！
questions.explanation: The grammar pattern '～たりとも...ない' means 'not even...'. '一匹たりとも逃がさない' means 'won't let even a single one escape'.
